style_authority.note: Preserves the restrained dense enterprise-console authority and the next-hour operator decision job.

reference_selection.note: Uses dashboard hierarchy, taste, design moves, resilient states, and validation guidance without unrelated domains.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Replaces equal cards, decorative charting, and generic tips with an exception-first operational decision surface.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review L0 static and refuses screenshot, DOM, browser, responsive, state, and runtime proof.

verified_boundary.note: Separates prompt facts and structural inference from unverified rendering, tokens, interactions, accessibility, and performance.

design_moves.note: Covers command context, lead/support metrics, exception queue, diagnostic chart, task-first table, contextual actions, visual density, and resilient states.

scope_control.note: Remains read-only and dashboard-specific, but 228 lines materially exceed the explicit 150-line cap.
